title: cyclopia vogelii var. subternata
intro: Cyclopia vogelii var. subternata, also known as Honeybush, is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and urinary problems due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Honeybush include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, as well as its potential to prevent certain types of cancer and diabetes. Honeybush can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tisane by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, which can be enjoyed hot or cold, and is often used as a substitute for rooibos tea.
